files.patch:
@@ -4394,0 +4394,1 @@
+# 0: type, 1: type
@@ -4395,1 +4396,2 @@
-    Overriden method''s return type is null restricted
+    incompatible null restrictions in overriding method\n\
+    return type {0} in the overriding does not match the return type {1}! in the overridden method
@@ -4398,0 +4400,1 @@
+# 0: fragment
@@ -4399,1 +4402,10 @@
-    One or more overriden method''s parameter types are null restricted
+    incompatible null restrictions in overriding method\n\
+    {0}
+
+# 0: type, 1: type
+compiler.misc.return.type.nullability.mismatch=\
+    return type {0} in the overriding does not match the return type {1}! in the overridden method
+
+# 0: type, 1: type
+compiler.misc.argument.type.nullability.mismatch=\
+    parameter type {0} in the overriding does not match the parameter type {1}! in the overridden method

@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@

+
+// key: compiler.note.preview.filename
+// key: compiler.note.preview.recompile
+// key: compiler.warn.argument.type.is.null.restricted
+// key: compiler.warn.return.type.is.null.restricted
+// options: -Xlint:null --enable-preview -source ${jdk.version}
+
+class OverriddenMethodHasNonNullableArgAndRetType {
+    class Test {
+        String! m(String! s) { return ""; }
+    }
+    class Sub extends Test {
+        @Override
+        String m(String s) { return null; }
+    }
+}
